title: GATE-02 closure - Publication and Retries
change_summary: GATE-02 declared CLOSED after CIC-TEST-REPORT-GATE-02-R2 passed all 8 deterministic cases on NTFS, including retry scheduling, failure-state visibility, re-publication, idempotence, consumer isolation, and event linkage.
decision_note: Tier 1 ratified Gate-02 closure on 2026-07-14. Closure does not activate governance runtime or close any other gate.
